LEGAL.TITLE: Legal
LEGAL.PRIVACY_INTRO: At RINOMED 2026, your privacy matters. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it during the congress.
LEGAL.P_NAME_DESC: To identify you in the app and on certificates.
LEGAL.P_EMAIL_DESC: For account access and congress communications.
LEGAL.P_PASSWORD_DESC: Stored in encrypted form to protect your account.
LEGAL.P_USAGE_1: Questions submitted during sessions (may be anonymous)
LEGAL.P_NO_1: We do not collect GPS location or geolocation data
LEGAL.P_NO_2: We do not access your contacts or phone calendar
LEGAL.P_NO_3: We do not track your activity outside the app
LEGAL.P_NO_4: We do not use third-party cookies or advertising
LEGAL.P_NO_5: We do not sell or share your data for commercial purposes
LEGAL.P_USE_1: Authentication and secure access to your account
LEGAL.P_USE_4: Display community content shared by participants
LEGAL.P_USE_5: Improve the congress experience through surveys
LEGAL.P_SHARE_INTRO: We share your information in limited ways only when necessary:
LEGAL.P_SHARE_1_DESC: Access to anonymous statistics and participant management.
LEGAL.P_NO_SHARE_1: We do not sell your data to third parties
LEGAL.P_NO_SHARE_2: We do not share information with advertisers
LEGAL.P_NO_SHARE_3: We do not transfer data outside the congress context
LEGAL.P_SEC_3: Restricted access via JWT tokens with expiration
LEGAL.P_RETENTION_TEXT: Your data is retained during the RINOMED 2026 congress period and up to 90 days after its conclusion. After this period, personal data will be securely deleted. Generated certificates may be downloaded during this period.
LEGAL.P_RIGHT_3: Request deletion of your account and data
LEGAL.P_RIGHT_4: Export your data in a readable format
LEGAL.TERMS_INTRO: These Terms of Use govern access to and use of the official RINOMED 2026 congress application. By using the app, you agree to these terms.
LEGAL.T_ACCEPT_TEXT: By registering and using this application, you accept these terms of use in their entirety. If you disagree, do not use the app. We may update these terms and will notify you of significant changes.
LEGAL.T_USE_1: The app is exclusively for registered participants of the RINOMED 2026 congress
LEGAL.T_USE_2: You must provide truthful information during registration
LEGAL.T_USE_3: You must not attempt to access other users' accounts
LEGAL.T_USE_4: Misuse may result in suspension of your account
LEGAL.T_ACCOUNT_TEXT: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. Each account is personal and non-transferable. If you suspect unauthorized access, contact the organizers immediately.
LEGAL.T_CONTENT_INTRO: By posting content in the app (questions, community photos), you agree that:
LEGAL.T_CONTENT_1: You are the author or have the right to share said content
LEGAL.T_CONTENT_2: The content is not offensive, defamatory, or illegal
LEGAL.T_CONTENT_3: Organizers may moderate or remove inappropriate content
LEGAL.T_COMMUNITY_TEXT: Photos and posts shared in the community gallery are visible to all congress participants. Organizers reserve the right to remove content that violates community guidelines or is inappropriate.
LEGAL.T_CERT_TEXT: Participation certificates are generated according to the assigned role and corresponding hours. Certificates are digital documents for personal use and do not constitute official academic degrees. Certificate generation requires completing the satisfaction survey.
LEGAL.T_IP_TEXT: The RINOMED 2026 application, including its design, code, logos, and content, is the property of the congress organizers. Reproduction, distribution, or modification without express authorization is prohibited.
LEGAL.T_LIABILITY_TEXT: The application is provided 'as is'. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or absence of technical errors. We are not responsible for losses arising from the use or inability to use the application during the congress.
LEGAL.T_CHANGES_TEXT: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication in the app. Continued use after modifications implies acceptance of the new terms.
LEGAL.T_LAW_TEXT: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Colombia. Any dispute shall be resolved in the competent courts of the city of Medellín, Colombia.
